title: Hex's Bronze Mod
body:
![Header Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e58d7dc26181c393129d88d3304772cc27d802e.png)

**Hex's Bronze Mod** is a NeoForge mod that adds a new material - **Bronze**! Unlike other materials, such as iron or gold, bronze must first be crafted as **Raw Bronze** using two Raw Iron and two Raw Copper. It can then be smelted and used as any other ingot.

All textures were made by my friend, **Franekioek** (or Fran for short)!
